missing.title: Pessoas Desaparecidas
missing.subtitle: Busque ou reporte uma pessoa desaparecida

search.dtvSearchedNoResults: We also searched Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela — no matches.
search.trustNote: Os resultados incluem registros do Vigil e de Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela. Ambas as fontes são iniciativas cidadãs verificadas sem fins lucrativos.
search.errorTitle: Não foi possível concluir a busca
search.errorBody: Houve um problema de conexão. Tente novamente.
search.psychosocialPrompt: If you need emotional support now:

empty.title: Ainda não encontramos essa pessoa
empty.intro: Não aparecer aqui não significa nada definitivo. Significa que ainda não está nesta base de dados.
empty.actionsTitle: Três coisas que você pode fazer agora:
empty.step1Body: Tente apenas o sobrenome, ou apenas o nome. Os registros chegam com a grafia que um familiar conseguiu escrever sob pressão — um acento, uma letra, um segundo sobrenome podem mudar o resultado.
empty.step2Body: Se não existe, crie. É o que permite que duas pessoas que procuram a mesma pessoa se encontrem. Não precisa de conta e leva menos de dois minutos.
empty.step3Body: Nenhuma base de dados tem tudo. Estas são as que operam nesta emergência:
empty.step3BodyReferred: Você já buscou no DTV. Estas são as demais que operam nesta emergência:
empty.federationNote: O Vigil também consulta a rede federada do Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela. Se a pessoa aparece lá, aparece aqui.

form.title: Reportar Pessoa Desaparecida
form.name: Nome Completo
form.photoHelp: Foto clara ajuda na identificação. Máximo 5MB.
form.contactEmailHelp: Se fornecido, enviaremos um link privado para gerenciar seu relatório.
form.contactPrivacyNote: Seus dados de contato NUNCA serão exibidos publicamente. Todo contato é roteado através do Vigil.
form.consent: Autorizo o Vigil a armazenar essas informações para ajudar a localizar essa pessoa
form.accuracy: Confirmo que essas informações são precisas conforme meu conhecimento
form.success: Relatório enviado. Você será notificado se houver correspondência.
form.queuedOffline: Salvo offline. Será enviado automaticamente quando você se reconectar.

crossReport.body: If you already reported this person on <link>Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela</link>, reporting here too expands their reach across the search network. If you haven't yet, we recommend reporting on both platforms.

photoSearch.privacyNotice: The photo is analyzed temporarily and not stored. Only visible physical traits are compared against our database.
photoSearch.dtvMatchLabel: Coincidências por reconhecimento facial — Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela
photoSearch.comingSoonBody: Photo search requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on the server.
photoSearch.unavailableBody: Photo search is not available right now. You can search by name, or report the person so they appear in the records.

missing.recentEmpty: Ainda não há registros recentes no Vigil. Ao buscar por nome, também incluímos os registros públicos de Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela.

dtvReferral.title: Você veio do Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela.
dtvReferral.bodyFull: O Vigil consulta essa mesma base de dados, então você verá os mesmos registros — mais os que foram criados aqui. O que o Vigil acrescenta: busca por fotografia, detalhamento por estado, município e paróquia, e mapa de crise com réplicas ao vivo.
dtvReferral.bodyNoPhoto: O Vigil consulta essa mesma base de dados, então você verá os mesmos registros — mais os que foram criados aqui. O que o Vigil acrescenta: detalhamento por estado, município e paróquia, e mapa de crise com réplicas ao vivo.

organizations.fraudWarning: ⚠️ Before donating: verify you are on the organization's official site. Type the URL directly. Beware of collection requests via direct message.
organizations.howToHelpLink: How to help — donations & collection points
organizations.usaVerifyNote: Organizações do sul da Flórida — verifique horários diretamente antes de se deslocar.

donate.title: Como Ajudar
donate.note: O Vigil não processa doações diretamente. Todos os links vão para organizações verificadas.

validation.tooShort: Muito curto — digite pelo menos 2 caracteres

privacy.shortNotice: Seus dados de contato nunca são exibidos publicamente. Não compartilhamos dados com o governo da Venezuela.

footer.madeFor: Construído para o povo da Venezuela

form.title: Publicar anúncio

form.privacyNotice: Seus dados de contato nunca são exibidos publicamente. Pessoas interessadas enviam uma solicitação de contato que você recebe para decidir se responde.

exchange.pageIntro: Peer-to-peer board to offer or request goods, shelter, transport, and skills. To mark a need on the crisis map, use I Need Help.

howToHelp.title: Como Ajudar
howToHelp.subtitle: Formas verificadas de apoiar a Venezuela

donations.title: Doações verificadas
donations.warning: ⚠️ Antes de doar: verifique que está no site oficial. Digite a URL diretamente no seu navegador. Cuidado com solicitações de coleta de pessoas desconhecidas via mensagem direta.
donations.curatedNote: Highlighted channels to donate now. See the full directory on Organizations.

teams.title: Países e equipes respondendo
teams.summary: Total: 2.624 resgatadores, 137 cães de busca, 44 equipes USAR.
teams.source: Fonte: ONU OCHA, 27 de junho de 2026
teams.suppressed: Peak USAR team figures (OCHA, 27 Jun 2026) are suppressed: older than 21 days and peak-response, not current deployment. See current Situation Reports.

transfers.title: Enviando dinheiro para a Venezuela
transfers.note: Ria Money Transfer dispensou taxas para transferências para a Venezuela até 15 de julho de 2026.

meru.title: Meru — remessas sem comissão
meru.note: A Meru eliminou comissões em remessas para a Venezuela durante a crise. Verifique as condições atuais no app ou site oficial antes de enviar.

banesco.title: Banesco — doações com contrapartida
banesco.note: O Banesco anunciou programas de contrapartida (matching) para doações relacionadas ao terremoto. Consulte os canais oficiais do banco para detalhes vigentes.

transfers.noteExpired: The Ria Money Transfer fee waiver (through 15 July 2026) has expired. Check current fees on their official site before sending.

collection.title: Pontos de coleta físicos
collection.ucvNote: Historical: collection point reported active 27 June — confirm current status before traveling.
collection.gemNote: Sede Doral FL (recebimento de suprimentos) + sede permanente GEM LATAM em La Guaira. Um único canal oficial: globalempowermentmission.org/donate.

familySearch.title: Family tracing — International Red Cross
familySearch.relocatedBody: Restoring Family Links (Red Cross) and DTV network search live under Search and Network — they are not donation channels.

ofac.title: Licença Geral OFAC 60 (EUA)
ofac.note: O Departamento do Tesouro dos EUA (OFAC) emitiu a Licença Geral 60 em 25 de junho de 2026, autorizando transações relacionadas à ajuda humanitária pelo terremoto na Venezuela apesar das sanções vigentes. A licença expira em 23 de outubro de 2026. Fonte: state.gov. O Vigil não oferece assessoria jurídica — consulte a fonte oficial.

howToHelp.expiredBadge: This promotion has ended — verify current terms at the source.

usaDiaspora.title: Apoio desde os EUA — recebimento GEM Doral
usaDiaspora.gemDoral: O armazém da GEM em Doral, Flórida, recebe doações de suprimentos para a resposta na Venezuela. Confirme os horários antes de se deslocar; use a página oficial de doação para as opções atuais.
usaDiaspora.hoursNote: ⚠️ Horários de recebimento: verificar diretamente com a GEM. O Vigil não publica horários não confirmados.

stats.title: Crisis statistics
stats.missingQualifier: Person-search figures update live from the DTV network — do not use static estimates.
stats.medicalStrain: The affected area remains under medical pressure. Official and independent figures may differ — Vigil shows both with attribution.
stats.officialFraming: Official figures come from Venezuelan government channels. Vigil publishes them attributed — not as independently verified. Where an independent analysis exists, it is shown alongside.

assistant.welcome: Hello. I'm the Vigil assistant. I can help you find shelters, organizations, volunteers, or guide you to the right feature. How can I help?
assistant.comingSoonBody: The assistant is not available right now. For emergencies call 911. You can keep using the map, search, and directories as usual.
assistant.errorFallback: I can't respond right now. Call {hotline} ({number}).
assistant.unavailableBody: The assistant is not available right now. For emergencies call 911. You can keep using the map, search, and directories as usual.

featured.description: Plataforma irmã com dezenas de milhares de relatos, reconhecimento facial e detalhamento geográfico. Os resultados de busca do Vigil incluem automaticamente seu banco de dados em tempo real.

platforms.venezuelaTeBusca: Citizen missing persons search platform for Venezuela.
platforms.civisVenezuela: Missing persons, damage maps, and supply points.
platforms.desaparecidosTerremoto: Large earthquake missing persons registry — verified public data.
platforms.redQuipu: Community aid and crisis coordination network.
platforms.mapaNecesidadesVzla: Zone-based live needs map (critical/partial/covered), community-reported and verified by collection centers.
platforms.encuentrameVzla: Locates people found and taken to hospitals.
platforms.venezuelaEarthquakeMap: Collaborative earthquake and damage map — external link, no data federation.
platforms.yummySos: Citizen emergency app — external link, no data federation.
platforms.centrosAyudaVenezuela: Community collection center directory — data imported via public CSV.
platforms.ayudaVenezuela: Per-state emergency directory with per-entry verification dates.
platforms.tiltelyVenezuela: Search and aid coordination with safety guidance.

red.reportHint: Each report on multiple platforms expands the search network.

propertyAssessment.title: Structural Safety Assessment
propertyAssessment.subtitle: Request a voluntary assessment of your home after the earthquake. Green/yellow/red tags follow the ATC-20 standard.
propertyAssessment.disclaimer: This assessment is a volunteer professional opinion, not an official government inspection. It does not override orders from local building or emergency authorities.

form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you observe in natural language…
form.photoNote: JPG/PNG/WebP, max 5 MB. AI only prioritizes queue — never assigns tags.
form.consent: I agree my request will be processed per Vigil Privacy Policy.
form.accuracy: I confirm this information is accurate to the best of my knowledge.
form.success: Request registered. Save your private tracking link.
form.nlAssistOffNote: AI-assisted entry is temporarily off. Complete the structured form as usual.

claim.title: Your assessment request
claim.relocationLinked: Your relocation request is linked to resource exchange.
claim.privacyNote: Your exact address and contact are never shown publicly.

emptyState.body: Request an assessment and we will match you with a volunteer professional when one is available.
emptyState.volunteerCta: I am an engineer or architect — register

viewMode.pickerTitle: What do you need right now?
viewMode.pickerSubtitle: We personalize the menu for your situation. You can always see everything.

busco_a_alguien.title: Searching for someone
tips: Search by name or upload a photo — we compare Vigil and Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela at once.
Save your claim link if you report someone — it's the only way to manage your report without an account.
Check public notes on each profile — they may have recent sightings.

necesito_ayuda.title: You need help now
tips: Use I Need Help to drop your location on the map — rescue teams see it in real time.
Call 911 before relying on the app alone.
Report connectivity if you find WiFi or signal — it helps others communicate.

quiero_ayudar.title: You want to help
tips: Register as a volunteer with your skills — rescue, medical, logistics, and more.
Post offers or needs on Exchange — contacts go through Vigil, not public phone numbers.
Register a collection point if your community receives donations.

soy_organizacion.title: You represent an organization
tips: Request listing on Organizations — admin approval required before public visibility.
Use Exchange and Calendar to coordinate resources and events with the community.
Check the Search network for federated sister platforms.

equipo_rescate.title: Rescue team
tips: The main map shows needs, resources, aftershocks, and collection points in layers.
Mark your active team so coordinators know where you operate.
Review Connectivity for signal and communication points.

solo_informacion.title: Information only
tips: Information aggregates USGS, GDACS, ReliefWeb, and emergency contacts.
Statistics shows Vigil counts and federated DTV data.
News and Wall have official updates and community messages.

busco_a_alguien.label: Searching for someone
busco_a_alguien.description: Diaspora families searching for missing persons

soy_organizacion.label: I'm an organization
soy_organizacion.description: NGOs, rescue teams, and aid groups

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Answers to frequently asked questions about Vigil.

whatIsVigil.a: Vigil is a humanitarian crisis platform that brings together missing persons search, live maps, resource exchange, and official disaster data in one mobile-friendly app.

government.a: No. Vigil is operated by Bbluestudios LLC under the YouTheWave initiative. It does not share user data with the Venezuelan government. See /privacy for details.

install.q: How do I install the app?
install.a: On mobile: open vigil.youthewave.org in Safari (iOS) or Chrome (Android) → Share → Add to Home Screen.

languages.a: 8 languages via the header switcher. Spanish is default.

free.a: Yes. Donation links on /donaciones go directly to verified organizations, not to Vigil.

search.q: How do I search for someone?
search.a: Go to Search (/buscar). Enter a name or filter by state. Results include Vigil and DTV federated records.

report.q: How do I report someone missing?
report.a: Go to Report (/reportar). Save your claim link — it's the only way to manage your report without an account.

claimLink.a: A unique URL (/mi-reporte/[token]) to update status and manage your report without a password.

phone.q: Can others see my phone number?
phone.a: No. Contact information is never shown on public pages.

status.a: Missing = active search. Found alive = safe. Found deceased = confirmed deceased. Unverified = not yet admin-verified.

photo.a: Upload a photo on the search page. AI suggests possible matches — always verify with families and authorities.

pfif.a: Person Finder Interchange Format — Vigil exports at /api/pfif.

sighting.q: How do I add a sighting note?
sighting.a: On a person's detail page, submit a public note with location and time. Do not include private contact info.

readMap.q: How do I read the crisis map?
readMap.a: The home map shows aftershocks, needs, resources, shelters, hospitals, and more.

needHelp.q: How do I report I need help?
needHelp.a: Go to I Need Help (/necesito-ayuda) and drop a pin with a description.

collectionPoint.a: A location accepting donated goods. Register at /punto-de-acopio or find points on the map.

colors.q: What are the map layer colors?
colors.a: Layer-specific — see map legend. Property assessments use ATC-20 colors.

register.q: How do I register as a volunteer?
register.a: Go to Volunteers (/voluntarios), select skills and languages, and provide contact.

exchange.a: Go to Exchange (/intercambio) to offer or request resources. Listings expire after 7 days.

contact.a: Contact requests go through Vigil — phone numbers are never public.

structural.a: Only if registered with structural skills and assigned by admin.

unverified.a: Citizen submission not yet confirmed by admin or official source.

flag.q: How do I report inappropriate content?
flag.a: Use the flag button on /muro. For missing persons, contact support@youthewave.org.

structural.a: No. Volunteer field opinions following ATC-20, not government inspections.

hotline.a: 911 — always shown in the site banner.

wifi.q: How do I report WiFi or Starlink?
wifi.a: Go to Connectivity (/conectividad) and report signal type with location.

alerts.q: Where do official alerts come from?
alerts.a: /informacion aggregates USGS, GDACS, ReliefWeb. /noticias shows ReliefWeb updates.

listed.a: Submit via org registration. Admin approval required.

sister.a: Independent citizen crisis tools linked at /red.

erasure.q: How do I request data erasure?

deploymentSuggestion.question: Você está em outra região? {label} está disponível.

deploymentSuggestion.regionsPrivacyNote: A sugestão de região usa apenas o país aproximado da sua conexão (cabeçalhos de rede da Vercel). Sem GPS, sua localização nunca é armazenada e não usamos cookies para isso.

prep.title: Preparação para emergências
prep.subtitle: Guias Antes / Durante / Depois adaptados de fontes oficiais (FEMA, Ready.gov, NWS, Cruz Vermelha).
prep.offlineHint: Os guias funcionam sem internet depois de abertos.
prep.planLocalNote: Este plano é salvo apenas no seu dispositivo. Nunca é enviado ao Vigil nem a nenhum servidor.
prep.offlineNote: Você está sem conexão — este guia funciona sem internet.
prep.sourcesNote: Conteúdo adaptado exclusivamente destas fontes. O Vigil não gera conselhos de segurança próprios.

press.metaDescription: Boilerplate, fact sheet, mission, story, and downloadable kit for media.
press.title: Press
press.subtitle: Verifiable material for journalists. No invented zeros. No donation ask.

boilerplate.title: Boilerplate
boilerplate.body: Vigil is an open-source humanitarian platform built in response to the 24 June 2026 earthquakes in Venezuela. It provides missing-persons search by name and by photograph, a live crisis map with seismic aftershock data, resource coordination between people in need and people who can help, and verified directories of organizations and collection points. It operates in eight languages for international rescue teams and is API-federated with Desaparecidos Terremoto Venezuela. No registration is required, no money is solicited, and the code is public under the MIT license. Vigil is a project of YouTheWave, founded by Orlando Toro.

factSheet.title: Fact sheet
factSheet.subtitle: Figures with source and date — same provenance system as the rest of the platform.
factSheet.dtvNote: Person-search figures come from the DTV network (federated API) and are not Vigil's own data.

stats.title: DTV network (live)
stats.subtitle: Attributed to desaparecidosterremotovenezuela.com
stats.disclaimer: Vigil does not invent or average figures. Official figures are labeled as such; federated figures carry DTV network attribution.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Be present when it matters most. Build technology that works in the worst conditions — no signal, no registration, no barriers — so no family is left without a way to search.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: Next time, no starting from zero. A platform that deploys in hours for any country and any disaster, and arrives at each emergency better than the last.

values.title: Values
values.honestyBody: Vigil's AI never invents information. When there is no data, it says so.
values.privacyBody: Family contact data is never public. It is never shared with the Venezuelan government.
values.federateBody: Data from other platforms is integrated by agreement and API, never by scraping.
values.openBody: Public code, MIT license, not for profit, no ads.
values.barrierBody: No registration, no account, no app. Works on 2G and offline.

story.title: The story
story.body: 48 hours. On 24 June 2026, during the Battle of Carabobo holiday, two earthquakes struck northern Venezuela 39 seconds apart: magnitude 7.2 near San Felipe, Yaracuy, and magnitude 7.5 near Yumare. They were the strongest in more than a century. Orlando Toro is Venezuelan and lives in Florida. Like hundreds of thousands in the diaspora, he spent that night trying to reach people who did not answer. He did not wait. In one overnight session he built and deployed Vigil. Vigil does not compete — it federates. What it adds is photo search, geographic breakdown to parish, eight languages, and a map that works on intermittent signal.

kit.title: Download press kit
kit.subtitle: One archive with one-pager, mission/vision/values, history, and fact sheet.
kit.bulletinsNext: Dated bulletins with hard numbers are the follow-on content task — not part of this initial kit.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.emptyHint: When published coverage exists, it will appear here with a link to the original.

founder.title: Founder and contact
founder.bio: Orlando Toro, founder of YouTheWave. Typical response in 1–2 business days (Spanish and English). YouTheWave is a pre-incorporation project — not a registered 501(c)(3).

govExclusion.title: Commitment: government data exclusion
govExclusion.body: Vigil publicly commits never to share user data with the Venezuelan government. This policy is architectural — not commercial.

contact.title: Press contact
contact.note: We reply in Spanish and English. Include your deadline and outlet. Vigil does not solicit donations.

monitor.title: Vigil Watch — Global monitor
monitor.subtitle: Official agency alerts. Vigil only relays — it does not issue its own warnings.
monitor.disclaimer: Each item comes from the issuing agency. Authority is always the linked official source. No AI commentary. No casualty figures.
monitor.empty: No active alerts in watched feeds right now.
monitor.agencyAuthoritative: The issuing agency is authoritative. Vigil does not issue this alert.
monitor.attribution: Sources: USGS, GDACS, NOAA NHC, NWS, NASA FIRMS, NOAA Tsunami, USGS Water, ReliefWeb, Open-Meteo.
monitor.disabled: The public monitor is temporarily disabled (kill switch).

servicios.title: Estado de servicios
servicios.subtitle: Reportes comunitarios por zona — sin cuenta.
servicios.reportHint: Tres toques. Varios reportes antes de cambiar una zona.
servicios.error: No se pudo guardar. Intenta de nuevo.

amenazas.title: Condiciones de lluvia y ladera
amenazas.subtitle: Lluvia observada. Vigil no emite alertas.
amenazas.boundary: Vigil retransmite condiciones — no pronostica ni alerta.
amenazas.boundaryDetail: Fuentes autorizadas: INAMEH y Protección Civil.
amenazas.slopeNote: Lluvia acumulada alta en zona de ladera — consulta INAMEH.

misReportes.title: Mis reportes
misReportes.subtitle: Guardados en este dispositivo con tokens. Sin cuenta.
misReportes.empty: Aún no hay reportes guardados en este dispositivo.
misReportes.emptyExplainer: Quando você envia um reporte, um pedido de troca ou de avaliação, ele fica salvo aqui neste dispositivo — sem conta — para você poder consultá-lo de novo. Você ainda não salvou nenhum.
